column1: # status is one of: pass, expectedFail, unsupported
# Every pinned upstream YAML Test Suite case with an in.yaml fixture must be
# classified. Cases marked pass are enforced against the currently available
# expectations: parse success/failure, test.event, and in.json. Cases marked
# expectedFail are YAML 1.2.2 compliance gaps that must fail at least one
